cover.title: Join the small talk
cover.sub: 6 lines for when you're stuck by the snacks

phrases.nl: Hoi, ik ben Maya. En jij?

phrases.en: Do you know many people here?

phrases.when: Keeping it going after they answer.
You missed their name. Everyone does.

phrases.nl: Ik ga even wat drinken halen.
phrases.en: I'm going to grab a drink.
phrases.when: A friendly way to step away.

cta.title: Save these before the next party
cta.sub: Send them to whoever you always go with.
